title: WEATHERIZATION ASSISTANCE PROGRAM - 211info
text: COMMUNITY CONNECTION OF NORTHEAST OREGON INC ADMINISTRATION OFFICE WEATHERIZATION ASSISTANCE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps reduce heat waste, improve indoor air quality, and address health/safety issues by caulking, insulating, doing duct work, and replacing doors. May also help replace exhaust fans and furnaces. 2802 Adams Avenue La Grande, OR 97850 Eligibility: Households with income no higher than 200% of the Federal Poverty Level Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 963-3186 1006 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Person (541) 963-3186 ext 1006 Kale Elmer [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of income AREA SERVED: Baker, Grant, Union, and Wallowa Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-4pm Services: Weatherization Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - AREA AGENCY ON AGING COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - AGING AND DISABILITY RESOURCE CONNECTION HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - HEALTH PROMOTION AND DISEASE PREVENTION HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING REHABILITATION LOANS MONEY MANAGEMENT - FORECLOSURE COUNSELING AND HOME BUYER EDUCATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COMMUNITY CONNECTION OF NORTHEAST OREGON INC ADMINISTRATION OFFICE
